\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}

\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$. In code: \begin{verbatim} InverseDifferentialForm[ω_k_, k_] := PseudoInverse[ExteriorDerivative[k], Method -> "HodgeLaplacian"] @ ω_k \end{verbatim} This provides a unique (up to gauge) $
